title: Stephens Co. upgrades Huntington Bancshares to overweight
text: Stephens Co. analyst Terry McEvoy on Monday upgraded Huntington Bancshares Inc. HBAN, -2.41% to overweight from equal-weight and raised the lender's price target by $1 to $17 a share. McEvoy cited a boost to the bank from its $22 billion acquisition of TCF Bank, which closed in July.

title: 3 High-Yield Stocks for Dividend Investors
text: Dividend investors may be interested in the following stocks as they offer much higher dividend yields than the S&P 500 Index. The U.S. benchmark index returned 1.45% at the end of regular hours on Friday.

title: Huntington Bancshares (HBAN) Surpasses Q1 Earnings and Revenue Estimates
text: Huntington Bancshares (HBAN) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of 3.23% and 1.45%, respectively, for the quarter ended March 2022. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: Huntington (HBAN) Q1 Earnings Beat on Revenue Growth, Loans Up
text: The TCF acquisition and net interest income growth drive Huntington's (HBAN) Q1 earnings. Elevated expenses and lower margins act as spoilsports.

title: HUNTINGTON BANCSHARES INCORPORATED REPORTS 2022 FIRST-QUARTER EARNINGS
text: Momentum Continues into Q1, with 2% Average Loan Growth or +10% Annualized, ex PPP. Increased Net Interest Income and Consecutive Expense Reductions Drive Record PPNR COLUMBUS, Ohio , April 21, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- 2022 First-Quarter Highlights: Earnings per common share (EPS) for the quarter were $0.29, an increase of $0.03 from the prior quarter.

title: Lower Fee Income to Hurt Huntington (HBAN) in Q1 Earnings
text: Despite cost savings and improvement in lending scenario, decline in fee income and NII is expected to have acted as spoilsports for Huntington's (HBAN) Q1 earnings.
